notes: Web export gating consumes PipelineResult.can_export as source of truth.
Upload traversal attempts are explicitly rejected with 400.
Upload size limit enforcement is verified with 413 response.
Preview error responses are sanitized for public API safety.
Pilot mode controls are available via CBAM_API_KEY, rate limiting, and session TTL cleanup.
mvp_release_gate.json.scope: CBAM flagship MVP remediation acceptance gate

notes: All strict v1 gates passed on current HEAD.
Backend semantic tests and web security/contract tests passed.
Frontend quality blocker workflow added for VCCI frontend lint/type/test/build.

scope.frontend: multi-app shell + security/contract test coverage + CI quality blocker
scope.v1_1: strict full-backend parity and evidence refresh

frontend_ux_blockers.evidence: All 6 workspaces production-grade: drag-drop upload, progress bars, results visualization, artifacts, error handling. No raw JSON output.

security_governance_blockers.evidence: V2 security governance CI passes: bandit, pip-audit, detect-secrets, Rego bundles verified

tests_v2.evidence: tests/v2/ suite green; 85% coverage threshold met

v2_gate.evidence: All V2 gate checks pass: contracts, conformance, pack tiers, agent registry

v2_runtime_checks.evidence: backends.py routes all 6 profiles through native V2 runtime_backend.py entrypoints

v2_validate_contracts.evidence: All 6 apps have gl.yaml with artifact_contract; V2 runtime_backend.py present for all 6

v2_closure_report.json.sign_off_notes: V2 product gaps closed: UI upgraded for all 6 apps, V2 backends created for CBAM/CSRD/VCCI, agent registry scaled to 30, all gates passed.

v2_completion_summary.agent_registry: 30 agents registered across 8 domains (platform-runtime, cbam, csrd, vcci, eudr, ghg, iso14064, governance, data); lifecycle states: 24 production, 3 qualified, 2 incubating, 1 retired
v2_completion_summary.backend_parity: All 6 apps (CBAM, CSRD, VCCI, EUDR, GHG, ISO14064) have native V2 runtime_backend.py; no V1 delegation in release mode
v2_completion_summary.navigation: Unified shell with all 6 app workspaces accessible from consistent top navigation across all pages
v2_completion_summary.ui_ux: All 6 workspaces upgraded to production-grade with consistent design system, drag-drop upload, progress visualization, structured results display, artifact management, and error handling
